description_long: This seafood shop features a rustic wooden structure with a blue-and-white striped awning covering the main counter, which is elevated on a wooden platform. The shop displays a colorful assortment of fish and seafood hanging from lines and laid out on the counter, with additional produce and goods arranged in wooden crates and barrels nearby. Decorative bunting in pastel colors is strung between posts, adding a festive touch to the scene. A small staircase leads up to the main platform, and a pumpkin sits beside the shop, suggesting a market or festival atmosphere. The shop is surrounded by a patch of ground with minimal grass, and the overall design is open and inviting, with clear areas for customer interaction. The materials and construction evoke a coastal or harbor-side market stall, emphasizing accessibility and charm.
description: A charming, rustic seafood shop with a blue-and-white striped awning, wooden platform, and colorful seafood displays, surrounded by crates, barrels, and festive bunting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main counter with seafood displays, striped awning, barrels, crates, and a pumpkin beside the platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, hanging seafood, and the arrangement of crates and barrels along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the shop, the platform, and the support structure, with less visible seafood and more focus on the wooden framework.
description_view_3: Opposite front view displaying the seafood from another angle, the awning, barrels, and the festive bunting strung between posts.
attribute_storefront_signage: No explicit text signage is visible. The storefront features a blue-and-white striped fabric awning as a visual identifier, with colorful bunting strung between wooden posts. The awning and bunting serve as decorative elements rather than traditional signage, using color and pattern to attract attention.
attribute_displayed_seafood: Several types of seafood are visible, including fish in various colors (blue, pink, yellow, purple) hanging from lines and laid out on the counter. The seafood is arranged neatly, some on wooden boards and others in open crates, with their shapes and colors clearly distinguishing them as fresh catch.
attribute_nautical_decorations: None. There are no visible anchors, ropes, nets, ship wheels, or other marine motifs present as decorations.
attribute_ice-filled_display_cases: None. There are no ice-filled display cases visible; seafood is displayed openly on wooden surfaces and in crates.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic Coastal; the shop features exposed wooden beams, a simple platform, and a striped awning, evoking the look of a traditional seaside market stall.
